commit_scope: Add a pure Form loop/mutation conformance vector and widen the Rust/Go runners to pass it alongside the existing control-flow, infix, core built-ins, and question-effect vectors.

commands: curl -sS --max-time 5 https://pulse.coherencycoin.com/pulse/now | jq '{overall, silences: (.ongoing_silences | length), silent_organs: [.organs[] | select(.status != "breathing") | .name]}'

python3 scripts/context_budget.py --token-budget 90000 scripts/verify_kernel_conformance.py api/tests/test_kernel_conformance_harness.py docs/coherence-substrate/form-language.md docs/coherence-substrate/kernel-conformance/README.md docs/coherence-substrate/kernel-conformance/form-control-flow.json docs/coherence-substrate/kernel-conformance/form-infix-operators.json docs/coherence-substrate/kernel-conformance/form-core-builtins.json docs/coherence-substrate/kernel-conformance/agent-question-effects.json specs/form-control-flow-kernel-conformance.md experiments/form-question-kernels/rust/src/main.rs experiments/form-question-kernels/go/question_kernel.go api/app/services/substrate/form_runtime.py api/tests/test_substrate_form_loops.py api/tests/test_substrate_form_runtime.py

cd api && /Users/ursmuff/source/Coherence-Network/api/.venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_kernel_conformance_harness.py tests/test_substrate_form_loops.py tests/test_substrate_form_question_effects.py tests/test_substrate_form_endpoint.py tests/test_agent_question_sse.py -q
git stash push -u -m codex-rebase-form-loop-kernel-vector && git fetch origin main && git rebase origin/main && git stash pop
local_validation.summary: Pulse was breathing at arrival. The branch adds form-loop-mutation.json, expands the Rust/Go runners from local control flow to a tiny local loop/mutation evaluator for for-list results, for-string iteration, accumulator mutation with set, list appending through concat, while-counting, while returning the last body value, unentered while returning null, and set through an inner block to an outer binding. Python, Rust, and Go pass the new loop/mutation vector, the control-flow vector, the infix vector, the core built-ins vector, and the existing question-effect vector. Focused conformance, loop/API/SSE regression tests, toolchain checks, formatting, Ruff, spec quality, generated indexes, JSON syntax, wellness, whitespace, evidence validation, rebase freshness, local PR guard, and stale PR follow-through passed.

phase_gate.reason: Local validation passed; CI, PR, and post-merge deploy checks are pending.
